episodes.title: Epstein Estate to pay up to $35M to victims in class action settlement
episodes.description: Jeffery Epstein's estate now says it will pay up to $35 million to victims, effectively settling a class action lawsuit, according to Reuters.

episodes.title: Documentary details Catholic church abuse
episodes.description: WWL morning anchor Brandon Walker sat down with Chief Investigator David Hammer, his reporting partner, and the team behind the film.
